mustPass: Has a dedicated route for the actual industry offering, not only generic services.
Makes practical visit information easy to find because location and opening hours are often important in this industry.
Uses honest, factual wording and avoids promises about winnings, outcomes or guarantees.
Includes clear contact paths and supports the category capability contact-form.
Supports trust-building through real business information, team, reviews or FAQs when available.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Generic service-business structure that ignores games, betting or visitor experience.
Invented licences, certifications, player counts or win claims.
Overuse of promotional language that obscures what the business actually offers.
Duplicate sections across pages with the same message and no new information.
CTAs that pressure users with unrealistic urgency or outcome-based promises.
